title: glottiphyllum difforme
intro: Glottiphyllum difforme, also known as the 'Split Rock' or 'Split-leaf Kalanchoe', is a species of succulent plant in the Crassulaceae family. It is native to South Africa and is characterized by its unique, split and lobed leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antifungal and antibacterial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Glottiphyllum difforme include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections, with herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures being commonly used.
